candidate_definition_hints.text: Deep Neural Pitch Extractor for Voice Conversion and TTS Training

This repo contains the training code for deep neural pitch extractor for Voice Conversion (VC) and TTS used in [StarGANv2-VC](https://github.com/yl4579/StarGANv2-VC) and [StyleTTS](https://github.com/yl4579/StyleTTS). This is the F0 network in StarGANv2-VC and pitch extractor in…
